element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn traversal mechanics before encountering stationary enemies or hazards
Different Ghostbusters available for different level challenges; choice impacts level progression
Statue of Liberty shooter sequence appears after obstacle courses, representing escalation to action-heavy content

typical_relief_triggers: Between-level story sequences with Vigo the Carpathian
Transition from action sequences back to platforming
typical_tension_triggers: Obstacle course hazards and traversal challenges
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating between obstacle course platforming and action shooter sequences with narrative breaks between levels

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory obstacle course platforming with basic traversal mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation through additional platforming challenges and introduction of shooter sequences
difficulty_curve.late_game: Action-heavy shooter sequences (Statue of Liberty) combined with platforming difficulty
notable_spikes: Transition from Level 3 platforming to Statue of Liberty shooter sequence
Railway level (Level 3) marked as progression point before major mechanical shift

notable_level_patterns.description: On-foot platforming levels where players navigate hazards and terrain using selected Ghostbuster character
Action-focused sequences breaking up platforming, featuring the Statue of Liberty as notable encounter
Different team members available for different level challenges; creates replayability and strategic variation

data_quality_notes: T3 tier data extracted from development/archival source. Level structure inferred from unused level remnants (Wall Street, Water Front driving levels, unstarted Peter Level 4) and confirmed stages. Exact mechanical details limited by source scope. No player-tested pacing data available.
